creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
It took a while for me to realise the significance of this report. 

> https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/

Excellent. 

If I can get to the LibreOffice original (or a copy) from which <https://people.freebsd.org/~grahamperrin/pkg-status/> was produced, I'll add a hint about the existence of IPv4-friendly URLs such as this, and then publish elsewhere.
